mapper.sql: A.BATCH_OPERT_ID AS batchOpertId, A.BATCH_OPERT_NM AS batchOpertNm, A.BATCH_PROGRM AS batchProgrm, A.PARAMTR AS paramtr, A.USE_AT AS useAt, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_BATCH_OPERT A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.BATCH_OPERT_ID LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BATCH_OPERT A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_BATCH_OPERT A WHERE A.BATCH_OPERT_ID = #{batchOpertId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BATCH_OPERT (BATCH_OPERT_ID, BATCH_OPERT_NM, BATCH_PROGRM, PARAMTR, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{batchOpertId}, #{batchOpertNm}, #{batchProgrm}, #{paramtr}, #{useAt}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
